title: Flow Version Cleaner
description: Removes old inactive flow versions across all unmanaged flows, keeping a configurable number of the most recent versions.

steps.label: 1. Apex Class
steps.note: Deploy this class to the org first via VS Code or the Developer Console before running step 2.

steps.label: 2. Apex Test Class
steps.note: Deploy alongside the main class. Run via the Apex Test Execution page or VS Code to verify coverage before using in production.

steps.label: 3. Run (Anonymous Apex)
steps.note: Execute in Anonymous Apex. Change the argument to the number of versions to retain. Check debug logs to confirm how many versions were deleted.
